title: Apply: chromosomes
description: Apply your understanding of chromosomes in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is the largest?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a cell
a chromosome
a gene

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is the smallest?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a gene
a chromosome
a cell

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which list is ordered from largest to smallest?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: gene, chromosome, cell
chromosome, gene, cell
cell, chromosome, gene

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which two traits are inherited via genes?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a person’s eye color
a person’s baseline risk of getting heart disease
a scar on a person’s arm

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which two traits are inherited via genes?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a person’s natural hair color
the likelihood that a person will lose their hair as they age
a person’s hairstyle

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which two traits are inherited via genes?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a person’s skin color
a person’s baseline risk of developing skin cancer
a tattoo on a person’s skin

assessment_items.question_content:
The diagram below shows a complete human karyotype. Two of the chromosomes in the karyotype are circled.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which two statements about the karyotype are true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

options.alt: An illustration of a complete human karyotype. The diagram shows 23 pairs of chromosomes, labeled 1 through 23. The chromosomes in each pair have the same size and shape. However, the size and shape of chromosomes between pairs is different. There is a circle around the chromosome pair labeled 10.

choices.content: The two chromosomes circled in the karyotype contain the same set of genes.
Each number in the karyotype labels a homologous pair of chromosomes.
The karyotype shows that humans have a total of 23 chromosomes.

assessment_items.question_content:
The diagram below shows a complete human karyotype. Two of the chromosomes in the karyotype are circled.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which two statements about the karyotype are true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

options.alt: An illustration of a complete human karyotype. The diagram shows 23 pairs of chromosomes, labeled 1 through 23. The chromosomes in each pair have the same size and shape. However, the size and shape of chromosomes between pairs is different. There is a circle around the chromosome pair labeled 5.

choices.content: The karyotype shows that humans have a total of 46 chromosomes.
Each number in the karyotype labels a homologous pair of chromosomes.
The two chromosomes circled in the karyotype contain different sets of genes.

assessment_items.question_content:
The diagram below shows a complete human karyotype. Two of the chromosomes in the karyotype are circled.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which two statements about the karyotype are true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

options.alt: An illustration of a complete human karyotype. The diagram shows 23 pairs of chromosomes, labeled 1 through 23. The chromosomes in each pair have the same size and shape. However, the size and shape of chromosomes between pairs is different. There is a circle around the chromosome pair labeled 14.

choices.content: The two chromosomes circled in the karyotype contain the same set of genes.
The karyotype shows that humans have a total of 46 chromosomes.
Each number in the karyotype labels a single chromosome.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which diagram correctly shows where chromosomes are found in multicellular organisms?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

choices.content: ![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located inside the nucleus.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fb9e5cc7e3231f0486d974d6c53e637d.png)
![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located in the cytosol, outside of the nucleus.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b539fd7072ee69bd000714f3b66ffd16.png)
![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located outside the plasma membrane.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fa9ea30438656c71fadddcc3f5630f9f.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which diagram correctly shows where chromosomes are found in multicellular organisms?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

choices.content: ![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located inside the nucleus.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aefa8219af534f6dfba236d116b1ae53.png)
![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located in the cytosol, outside of the nucleus.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4a6f59c6bfebe02a61d85441224348f.png)
![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located outside the plasma membrane.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cadcc1a98cca4989a452aaf7b6cdc4e7.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which diagram correctly shows where chromosomes are found in multicellular organisms?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

choices.content: ![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located inside the nucleus.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8978a018f48ba30a48c51466396a1a78.png)
![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located in the cytosol, outside of the nucleus.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/70c5c7771e14308a35eba3bda143b6a0.png)
![A cell with four chromosomes. The chromosomes are located outside the plasma membrane.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/665bb28b466c81e87f986cc171041a79.png)
